questions.question:
A Deployment named `reports-db` in namespace `pv-reclaim-lab` is not using the intended bound PVC/PV contract.

Fix the workload so that:
- PVC `reports-data` stays bound to PV `reports-pv`
- PV `reports-pv` keeps `persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Retain`
- Deployment `reports-db` uses claim `reports-data`
- the volume mounts at `/var/lib/reporting`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container writes `reports-ready` to `/var/lib/reporting/ready.txt`

Do not delete the PVC or PV, and do not replace the existing reclaim policy or claimRef contract.

verification.description: The bound PVC/PV contract stays intact and Deployment reports-db uses the intended claim and mount path
Deployment reports-db becomes Available after the storage wiring repair
The running container writes reports-ready to the mounted storage path
